meaning: v.横着走,悄悄贴近,侧身而行n.横行,侧走,挨近
examples: Sara Sidle: What do you think caused these marks?
He can not sidle away from personal responsibility.
The young man began to sidle near the pretty girl sitting on the log.
Consumer spending will no more than sidle ahead, and fixed investment will continue to decline.
The ancient predators slowly sidle up to the boat, then leap out of the water to grab their prey.
